title: Into the Deep
description: An unexplored section of Willow Dale was recently uncovered by a cave-in. The Guild wants it mapped and cleared of threats. Any artifacts or treasure you find are yours to keep - standard dungeon delving contract. Watch for traps.

objectives.description: Enter the newly discovered section of Willow Dale
Explore all chambers in the deep section
Recover the ancient artifact from the vault
Solve the vault puzzle to access the artifact

notes: Rank: Veteran. Dungeon exploration with traps and puzzles. Willow Dale deep section. Optional puzzle for bonus rewards. Boots give trap detection bonus.
